source: honest FP8 reference, recorded against vLLM PoC v2 with DEEPGEMM Fp8 MoE backend (VLLM_USE_DEEP_GEMM=1, VLLM_MOE_USE_DEEP_GEMM=1) on 4xB200, tp=2 no-EP
notes: stat_test mirrors chain consensus params for qwen235b (dist_threshold=2e-1, p_mismatch=1e-1, p_value_threshold=5e-2; the chain's p_value_threshold maps to the MLNode protocol's fraud_threshold field).
